novel_features.name: Bulk fan-out control
novel_features.description: Power, mode, or speed across every device matching a type/room filter in one command.
novel_features.rationale: Only possible because the CLI keeps a local devices table and can multiplex WebSocket control frames in parallel; reference clients are HA-resident and have no bulk surface.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Replaces the #1 user pain — tapping each device in the Dreo app at bedtime — with one cron-callable line.

novel_features.name: Whole-house sensor snapshot
novel_features.description: Aggregated temperature, humidity, and PM2.5 across every sensor-bearing device in one ranked table.
novel_features.rationale: No single Dreo endpoint returns aggregated sensors; this fans out per device and composes locally.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Answers the agent question 'what's the air quality across my house?' in one tool call.

novel_features.name: Live WebSocket state stream
novel_features.description: Tail-f for Dreo device state — every WebSocket update as a JSON line on stdout.
novel_features.rationale: Reference clients bury the WebSocket inside Python/TypeScript modules; no existing tool exposes raw state frames for debugging.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Enables automation debugging without running Home Assistant, and feeds agent stream-processing pipelines.

novel_features.name: Sensor timeseries history
novel_features.description: Persist WebSocket state events to a local sensor_readings table and query temperature/humidity/PM2.5 over arbitrary time windows.
novel_features.rationale: No other Dreo tool keeps history; built on the cross-source local store the press provides.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Answers 'when did the bedroom fan last go to sleep mode' and similar historical questions agents and users actually ask.

novel_features.name: Threshold and offline alerts
novel_features.description: Report devices with low filter life, empty water tank, offline heartbeat, or sensor readings past a threshold.
novel_features.rationale: Joins cached devices + latest device_state; no equivalent in any reference client.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Surfaces actionable problems (filter, water, dead devices) without manually inspecting each device.

novel_features.name: Scene save and apply
novel_features.description: Capture the current state across selected devices as a named scene and replay it later as parallel WebSocket frames.
novel_features.rationale: Local SQLite scene store + WS fan-out; replaces the Dreo app's brittle scene feature.
novel_features.example: dreo-pp-cli scene save bedtime --all && dreo-pp-cli scene apply bedtime --dry-run
novel_features.why_it_matters: Sam's nightly bedtime routine becomes one command; survives app updates.

novel_features.name: Per-room rollup
novel_features.description: Group devices by room with on-count, average temperature, and average humidity per room.
novel_features.rationale: Cross-entity local join over cached devices + latest state; the by-room endpoint exists but does not aggregate.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Answers 'what's happening in my bedroom right now' in one query.

novel_features.name: Local device search
novel_features.description: Full-text search over cached device name, room, model, and serial.
novel_features.rationale: Generator-emitted FTS over local SQLite — works offline.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Fast device lookup for scripts and agents without round-tripping the cloud.

narrative.headline: The only standalone CLI for Dreo smart-home devices — bulk control, live sensor streams, and a local history every other Dreo tool throws away.
narrative.value_prop: Every existing Dreo client is bundled inside Home Assistant or Homebridge; this is the first general-purpose CLI. It speaks the same WebSocket control protocol the reverse-engineered clients use, plus it keeps a local SQLite cache so bulk fan-out, cross-device sensor snapshots, sensor history, scenes, and alerts work even when the cloud is slow.
narrative.auth_narrative: Dreo has no public API. Authentication uses your Dreo account email and password (MD5-hashed) against the same OAuth endpoint the Dreo iOS app calls. Set DREO_USERNAME and DREO_PASSWORD; the CLI handles region discovery, token caching, and refresh on 401. No third-party developer account needed.

quickstart.comment: Verify credentials and login round-trip against the live API
See every device on your Dreo account with model, room, and online status
Whole-house temperature, humidity, and PM2.5 in one shot
Turn off every tower fan in one command — the bedtime ritual
Live WebSocket state stream as JSON lines — the realtime debug surface no other Dreo tool exposes

troubleshoots.fix: Verify DREO_USERNAME and DREO_PASSWORD are exported; if you changed your password in the Dreo app, run dreo-pp-cli auth login again
Run dreo-pp-cli devices list --live to bypass the local cache and fetch fresh from the cloud

troubleshoots.symptom: Commands return but device state does not change
troubleshoots.fix: Add --wait to the set/bulk command so the CLI confirms the WebSocket state echo before exiting
Set DREO_REGION=eu (or us) to skip the region-discovery round-trip; the CLI auto-detects on first login

narrative.when_to_use: Reach for this CLI whenever an agent or script needs to read or control Dreo devices without Home Assistant in the loop. It is ideal for one-shot bulk commands (turn everything off at bedtime), whole-house sensor reads, live state streaming for automation debugging, and any cron-driven Dreo automation. The agent-callable MCP surface mirrors every Cobra command so AI agents can drive your home without a custom integration.

recipes.title: Bedtime bulk-off
recipes.command: dreo-pp-cli bulk --action off --type tower-fan && dreo-pp-cli bulk --action off --type air-purifier
recipes.explanation: One line replaces ten taps in the Dreo app; cron-friendly.

recipes.title: Whole-house sensor read (agent-friendly with --select)
recipes.explanation: Returns only the sensor columns an agent needs, dropping the verbose device metadata.

recipes.title: Capture a bedtime scene
recipes.command: dreo-pp-cli scene save bedtime --all && dreo-pp-cli scene apply bedtime --dry-run
recipes.explanation: Snapshot all device state under a named scene, then replay it any night.

recipes.title: Filter and water-tank alert sweep
recipes.explanation: Reports purifiers with filter life < 10% and humidifiers with empty water tanks across your whole account.

recipes.title: Sensor history query
recipes.explanation: Query the local sensor_readings table for the past 24 hours of temperature data — no other Dreo tool keeps history.

trigger_phrases: what's the temperature in my house
